code:
// 교육용 빅뱅 시뮬레이션 - 중앙 뭉치 + 주변 궤도 형식
import*as THREE from"three";/**
 * 1️⃣ 쿼크-글루온 플라즈마 (2초)
 * 중앙에 뜨거운 입자 뭉치 + 주변 3개 궤도
 */export function createQuarkGluonPlasma(){let stageProgress=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:0;const group=new THREE.Group();const time=Date.now()*0.001;// ========== 중앙 핵 뭉치 ==========
const coreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=100000;const corePositions=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreColors=new Float32Array(numCore*3);for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){// 중앙에 밀집된 구체
const r=Math.pow(Math.random(),0.33)*40;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 컬러풀한 색상 - 빨강/파랑/초록/노랑
const colorType=Math.floor(Math.random()*4);if(colorType===0){// 빨강
coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=0.3;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.3;}else if(colorType===1){// 파랑
coreColors[i*3]=0.3;coreColors[i*3+1]=0.5;coreColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}else if(colorType===2){// 초록
coreColors[i*3]=0.3;coreColors[i*3+1]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.3;}else{// 노랑
coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.3;}}coreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePositions,3));coreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreColors,3));const coreMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.5,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.8});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeometry,coreMaterial);corePoints.userData.isDynamic=true;group.add(corePoints);// ========== 주변 3개 궤도 ==========
const orbits=[{radius:150,color:[1.0,0.3,0.3],count:120000},{radius:250,color:[0.3,0.5,1.0],count:120000},{radius:350,color:[0.3,1.0,0.3],count:120000}];orbits.forEach((orbit,orbitIdx)=>{const orbitGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const positions=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);const colors=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);for(let i=0;i<orbit.count;i++){const baseAngle=i/orbit.count*Math.PI*2;const angle=baseAngle+time*(orbitIdx+0.5);const tiltAngle=orbitIdx/3*Math.PI*0.3;const x=Math.cos(angle)*orbit.radius;const y=Math.sin(angle)*orbit.radius*Math.cos(tiltAngle);const z=Math.sin(angle)*orbit.radius*Math.sin(tiltAngle);positions[i*3]=x;positions[i*3+1]=y;positions[i*3+2]=z;colors[i*3]=orbit.color[0];colors[i*3+1]=orbit.color[1];colors[i*3+2]=orbit.color[2];}orbitGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions,3));orbitGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(colors,3));const orbitMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.7});const orbitPoints=new THREE.Points(orbitGeometry,orbitMaterial);orbitPoints.userData.isDynamic=true;group.add(orbitPoints);});return group;}/**
 * 2️⃣ 쿼크 결합 (2.5초)
 * 궤도 입자들이 중앙으로 모이면서 핵 형성 시작
 */export function createQuarkCombination(){let stageProgress=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:0;const group=new THREE.Group();const time=Date.now()*0.001;// ========== 성장하는 중앙 핵 ==========
const coreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=150000;const corePositions=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreColors=new Float32Array(numCore*3);// 핵의 크기가 진행도에 따라 증가
const coreRadius=40+stageProgress*40;for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){const r=Math.pow(Math.random(),0.33)*coreRadius;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 핵 색상: 주로 빨강(양성자) + 파랑(중성자)
if(Math.random()>0.4){coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=0.3;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.3;}else{coreColors[i*3]=0.3;coreColors[i*3+1]=0.5;coreColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}}coreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePositions,3));coreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreColors,3));const coreMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.5,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.5+stageProgress*0.4});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeometry,coreMaterial);corePoints.userData.isDynamic=true;group.add(corePoints);// ========== 수축하는 3개 궤도 ==========
const orbits=[{startRadius:150,color:[1.0,0.3,0.3],count:100000},{startRadius:250,color:[0.3,0.5,1.0],count:100000},{startRadius:350,color:[0.3,1.0,0.3],count:100000}];orbits.forEach((orbit,orbitIdx)=>{const orbitGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const positions=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);const colors=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);// 진행도에 따라 궤도 반경이 감소
const radius=orbit.startRadius*(1-stageProgress)+100*stageProgress;for(let i=0;i<orbit.count;i++){const baseAngle=i/orbit.count*Math.PI*2;const angle=baseAngle+time*(orbitIdx+0.5);const tiltAngle=orbitIdx/3*Math.PI*0.3;const x=Math.cos(angle)*radius;const y=Math.sin(angle)*radius*Math.cos(tiltAngle);const z=Math.sin(angle)*radius*Math.sin(tiltAngle);positions[i*3]=x;positions[i*3+1]=y;positions[i*3+2]=z;colors[i*3]=orbit.color[0];colors[i*3+1]=orbit.color[1];colors[i*3+2]=orbit.color[2];}orbitGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions,3));orbitGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(colors,3));const orbitMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:(1-stageProgress*0.3)*0.7});const orbitPoints=new THREE.Points(orbitGeometry,orbitMaterial);orbitPoints.userData.isDynamic=true;group.add(orbitPoints);});return group;}/**
 * 3️⃣ 핵융합 - 원자핵 형성 (2.5초)
 * 양성자/중성자들이 핵으로 모이기 시작, 헬륨-4 등 경핵 형성
 */export function createNucleosynthesis(){let stageProgress=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:0;const group=new THREE.Group();const time=Date.now()*0.001;// ========== 형성되는 원자핵 ==========
const coreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=200000;const corePositions=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreColors=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreRadius=40+stageProgress*50;for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){const r=Math.pow(Math.random(),0.33)*coreRadius;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 핵 색상: 청록색(He-4), 녹색(Li), 노랑(Be)
const colorType=Math.floor(Math.random()*3);if(colorType===0){// He-4 - 청록
coreColors[i*3]=0.2;coreColors[i*3+1]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+2]=1.0;}else if(colorType===1){// Li - 녹색
coreColors[i*3]=0.3;coreColors[i*3+1]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.3;}else{// Be - 노랑
coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.3;}}coreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePositions,3));coreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreColors,3));const coreMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.5,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.6+stageProgress*0.3});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeometry,coreMaterial);corePoints.userData.isDynamic=true;group.add(corePoints);// ========== 4개 PN 궤도 ==========
const orbits=[{startRadius:150,color:[1.0,0.5,0.5],count:80000},{startRadius:250,color:[0.5,0.7,1.0],count:80000},{startRadius:350,color:[0.5,1.0,0.5],count:80000},{startRadius:450,color:[1.0,1.0,0.5],count:80000}];orbits.forEach((orbit,orbitIdx)=>{const orbitGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const positions=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);const colors=new Float32Array(orbit.count*3);const radius=orbit.startRadius*(1-stageProgress)+120*stageProgress;for(let i=0;i<orbit.count;i++){const baseAngle=i/orbit.count*Math.PI*2;const angle=baseAngle+time*(orbitIdx+0.5);const tiltAngle=orbitIdx/4*Math.PI*0.4;const x=Math.cos(angle)*radius;const y=Math.sin(angle)*radius*Math.cos(tiltAngle);const z=Math.sin(angle)*radius*Math.sin(tiltAngle);positions[i*3]=x;positions[i*3+1]=y;positions[i*3+2]=z;colors[i*3]=orbit.color[0];colors[i*3+1]=orbit.color[1];colors[i*3+2]=orbit.color[2];}orbitGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions,3));orbitGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(colors,3));const orbitMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:(1-stageProgress*0.2)*0.7});const orbitPoints=new THREE.Points(orbitGeometry,orbitMaterial);orbitPoints.userData.isDynamic=true;group.add(orbitPoints);});return group;}/**
 * 4️⃣ 원자 형성 (3초)
 * 작은 원자핵 주변을 전자 껍질이 감싸는 보어 모델
 */export function createAtomFormation(){let stageProgress=arguments.length>0&&arguments[0]!==undefined?arguments[0]:0;const group=new THREE.Group();const time=Date.now()*0.001;// ========== 작은 원자핵 (중앙) ==========
const coreGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const numCore=100000;const corePositions=new Float32Array(numCore*3);const coreColors=new Float32Array(numCore*3);// 핵은 매우 작음
const coreRadius=8;for(let i=0;i<numCore;i++){const r=Math.pow(Math.random(),0.33)*coreRadius;const theta=Math.random()*Math.PI*2;const phi=Math.random()*Math.PI;corePositions[i*3]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.cos(theta);corePositions[i*3+1]=r*Math.sin(phi)*Math.sin(theta);corePositions[i*3+2]=r*Math.cos(phi);// 핵은 노랑
coreColors[i*3]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+1]=1.0;coreColors[i*3+2]=0.3;}coreGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(corePositions,3));coreGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(coreColors,3));const coreMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:3.0+stageProgress*2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.8+stageProgress*0.2});const corePoints=new THREE.Points(coreGeometry,coreMaterial);group.add(corePoints);// ========== 3개 전자 껍질 (K, L, M) ==========
const shells=[{radius:80,color:[0.2,0.8,1.0],count:150000},// K-shell
{radius:160,color:[0.5,0.9,1.0],count:150000},// L-shell
{radius:240,color:[0.7,0.95,1.0],count:100000}// M-shell
];shells.forEach((shell,shellIdx)=>{const shellGeometry=new THREE.BufferGeometry();const positions=new Float32Array(shell.count*3);const colors=new Float32Array(shell.count*3);// 진행도에 따라 전자 껍질 크기 증가
const radius=shell.radius*stageProgress;for(let i=0;i<shell.count;i++){// 기본 각도 (고정)
const baseAngle=i/shell.count*Math.PI*2;// 시간에 따라 회전 - 각 껍질마다 다른 속도
const angle=baseAngle+time*(shellIdx+1)*0.5;// 각 껍질별 궤도 평면 틸트
const tiltAngle=i/shell.count*Math.PI*0.4;const x=Math.cos(angle)*radius;const y=Math.sin(angle)*radius*Math.cos(tiltAngle);const z=Math.sin(angle)*radius*Math.sin(tiltAngle);positions[i*3]=x;positions[i*3+1]=y;positions[i*3+2]=z;colors[i*3]=shell.color[0];colors[i*3+1]=shell.color[1];colors[i*3+2]=shell.color[2];}shellGeometry.setAttribute("position",new THREE.BufferAttribute(positions,3));shellGeometry.setAttribute("color",new THREE.BufferAttribute(colors,3));const shellMaterial=new THREE.PointsMaterial({size:1.2,vertexColors:true,sizeAttenuation:true,transparent:true,opacity:0.1+stageProgress*0.6});const shellPoints=new THREE.Points(shellGeometry,shellMaterial);shellPoints.userData.isDynamic=true;group.add(shellPoints);});return group;}// ========== 단계 정보 ==========
export const educationalBigBangStages=[{id:0,name:"쿼크-글루온 플라즈마",timeRange:"10⁻¹² 초",temperature:"10¹⁶ K",description:"우주 초기 - 극도로 뜨거운 쿼크와 글루온의 혼합",duration:2000},{id:1,name:"쿼크 → 양성자/중성자",timeRange:"10⁻⁶ 초",temperature:"10¹³ K",description:"쿼크들이 결합하여 양성자와 중성자 형성",duration:2500},{id:2,name:"핵융합 → 원자핵 형성",timeRange:"1-3 분",temperature:"10⁹ K",description:"양성자/중성자가 핵융합하여 헬륨-4, 리튬, 베릴륨 등 경핵 형성",duration:2500},{id:3,name:"원자 형성 (보어 모델)",timeRange:"38만 년",temperature:"< 10⁴ K",description:"전자가 원자핵 주변의 껍질에 캡처되어 중성 원자 형성",duration:3000}];// 현재 단계 선택
export const getStageFunction=stageId=>{const functions=[createQuarkGluonPlasma,createQuarkCombination,createNucleosynthesis,createAtomFormation];return functions[stageId]||createQuarkGluonPlasma;};
